5.0 out of 5 stars 5.0 out of 5 stars Best noise canceling headphones ever! Reviewed in the United States on January 15, 2024
Color: Black
Verified Purchase These headphones are absolutely incredible. The noise cancellation is top-notch, the sound quality is amazing, and they are super comfortable for long listening sessions. Battery life is great too. Highly recommend! 42 people found this helpful
Sarah M.
4.0 out of 5 stars 4.0 out of 5 stars Great sound but a bit pricey Reviewed in the United States on March 22, 2024 Verified Purchase Sound quality is excellent and the ANC works really well. My only complaint is the price point — you can get 90% of the performance from cheaper alternatives. Still, if you want the best, these are it. One person found this helpful
TechReviewer99
3.0 out of 5 stars 3.0 out of 5 stars Decent but not worth the hype Reviewed in the United States on February 8, 2024
Color: Silver
The headphones are okay but I expected more for the price. The ANC is good but not dramatically better than my old pair. Comfort is fine for about 2 hours, then my ears get warm. Build quality feels solid though.
MusicLover
5.0 out of 5 stars 5.0 out of 5 stars Perfect for commuting Reviewed in the United States on December 3, 2023 Verified Purchase I use these every day on my commute and they block out all the subway noise perfectly. The multipoint Bluetooth connection lets me switch between my phone and laptop seamlessly. Absolutely love them. 7 people found this helpful
DisappointedBuyer
1.0 out of 5 stars 1.0 out of 5 stars Broke after 2 months Reviewed in the United States on April 10, 2024 The left ear cup stopped working after just two months of normal use. Very disappointed with the build quality for a premium product at this price point. Returning for a refund.
